'''鈭歱-m-t-ch''' ('''kapamtechoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:moonlight|moonlight]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-m-t-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:moonlight|moonlight]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歱-m-t-ch
|-
! Lemma
| kapamtechoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thipamtechoko|thipamtechoko]] || [[word:jipamtechoko|jipamtechoko]] || [[word:shipamtechoko|shipamtechoko]] || [[word:kipamtechoko|kipamtechoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthupamtechoko|thuthupamtechoko]] || [[word:jujupamtechoko|jujupamtechoko]] || [[word:shushupamtechoko|shushupamtechoko]] || [[word:kukupamtechoko|kukupamtechoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thupamtechoko|thupamtechoko]] || [[word:jupamtechoko|jupamtechoko]] || [[word:shupamtechoko|shupamtechoko]] || [[word:kupamtechoko|kupamtechoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thupamtechoko|thupamtechoko]] || [[word:jupamtechoko|jupamtechoko]] || [[word:shupamtechoko|shupamtechoko]] || [[word:kupamtechoko|kupamtechoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thepamtechoko|thepamtechoko]] || [[word:jepamtechoko|jepamtechoko]] || [[word:shepamtechoko|shepamtechoko]] || [[word:kepamtechoko|kepamtechoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothopamtechoko|thothopamtechoko]] || [[word:jojopamtechoko|jojopamtechoko]] || [[word:shoshopamtechoko|shoshopamtechoko]] || [[word:kokopamtechoko|kokopamtechoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thopamtechoko|thopamtechoko]] || [[word:jopamtechoko|jopamtechoko]] || [[word:shopamtechoko|shopamtechoko]] || [[word:kopamtechoko|kopamtechoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thopamtechoko|thopamtechoko]] || [[word:jopamtechoko|jopamtechoko]] || [[word:shopamtechoko|shopamtechoko]] || [[word:kopamtechoko|kopamtechoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙pamtechoko|th忙pamtechoko]] || [[word:j忙pamtechoko|j忙pamtechoko]] || [[word:sh忙pamtechoko|sh忙pamtechoko]] || [[word:k忙pamtechoko|k忙pamtechoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathapamtechoko|thathapamtechoko]] || [[word:jajapamtechoko|jajapamtechoko]] || [[word:shashapamtechoko|shashapamtechoko]] || [[word:kakapamtechoko|kakapamtechoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thapamtechoko|thapamtechoko]] || [[word:japamtechoko|japamtechoko]] || [[word:shapamtechoko|shapamtechoko]] || [[word:kapamtechoko|kapamtechoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thapamtechoko|thapamtechoko]] || [[word:japamtechoko|japamtechoko]] || [[word:shapamtechoko|shapamtechoko]] || [[word:kapamtechoko|kapamtechoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
